Author: The Enceladeum
Name: HOutfits
Punchline: Apply full sets to your character in Glamourer with a single click.
Description: Lists the game's complete named sets and applies a whole set or any single piece to your character through Glamourer, instead of picking each item from a dropdown.
Changelog: 0.1.2: the installed plugin now shows its icon — the manifest carries an IconUrl, which is how Dalamud resolves a repo-installed plugin's icon.

Author: The Enceladeum
Name: Cosmic Claw
Description: Play the Cosmic Predator's Magitek Claw Sweep animation on demand, once or on a loop, while you're riding it. Purely cosmetic and local-only; nothing is sent to the server. Works on both the Cosmic Predator and the standard Magitek Predator. Commands: /clawsweep and /clawsweeploop.
Changelog: 0.1.1: loop now repeats until toggled off; also works on the standard Magitek Predator (mount 121); tidier command help and quieter chat.
